---
title: "plot evolutionary trajectory for multiple models"
author: "Andrea Chen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

# parameter for plotting
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
wd_path <- normalizePath(dirname(rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
setwd(wd_path)
base_plot_folder <- "../plots/11_17/fluctuate_env_constant_psi/"
plot_n <- c(2, 8, 20, 50) # group sizes to plot for both models
plot_shift_sizes <- c(20, 40, 60) # shift sizes to plot for both models
regimes <- c("inv", "fit", "ext", "ave")  # "inv" = inverse variance model, "fit" = fittest individual model
plot_reps <- TRUE  # whether to plot individual replicate series 
hcl_color_palette <- "Dark 2" # color pattern for lines 
tick_seq <- 9970:10300 # ticks to plot
```

# load evolutionary trajectory data
```{r}
data_df <- readRDS("../r_data/e_psi_with_bg_psi/summary.rds")
```

```{r}
data_df <- summary_stat_df
```

```{r}
reg = "ave"          # choose from "inv", "fit", "ext", "ave"
n = 50               # choose from 2, 8, 20, 50
shift_size = 120     # choose from 40, 80, 120
plot_folder = paste0(base_plot_folder, "z_mean/")
colname = "z_mean"  # column to plot
if (!dir.exists(plot_folder)) {
  dir.create(plot_folder, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (gap in c(1, 10)){
    for (n in c(2,8,20,50)){
        for (reg in c("inv", "fit", "ext", "ave")){
            filt_A <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.0, fluctuate_gap = gap)
            filt_B <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.5, fluctuate_gap = gap)
            filt_C <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.9, fluctuate_gap = gap)

            title <- paste0(
            if (reg == "inv") "Homogenous group" else
                if (reg == "fit") "copy the best" else
                if (reg == "ext") "copy the extreme" else
                    if (reg == "ave") "copy the average",
            " model (n = ", n, ")"
            )

            if (!dir.exists(paste0(plot_folder,"gap_", gap))) {
                dir.create(paste0(plot_folder,"gap_", gap), recursive = TRUE)
            }

            png(paste0(plot_folder,"gap_", gap, "/", "reg_", reg, "_n_", n, "_gap_", gap, ".png"), width = 2200, height = 1800, res = 150)
            par(cex.axis = 1.6, cex.lab = 2.0, cex.main = 1.0, mar = c(4.5, 6, 3, 1))

            plot_lines_multi(
                df      = data_df,
                filters = list(filt_A, filt_B, filt_C),
                ycol    = colname,  # << choose the column to plot
                labels  = list(
                    title = title,
                    x = "Tick",
                    y = "Proportion"      # or any y label you want
                ),
                show_rep = TRUE,       # faded per-rep lines? TRUE/FALSE
                cols = c(
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1],
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3]
                ),
                ylim = c(0, ),
                xlim = c(10000, 10000+10*gap)
            )

            leg_expr <- as.expression(lapply(c(filt_A$psi, filt_B$psi, filt_C$psi),
                                            function(v) bquote(psi == .(v))))
            legend("topright", bty = "n", legend = leg_expr,
                col = c(
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[1],
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[2],
                    hcl.colors(3, hcl_color_palette, rev = TRUE)[3]
                ),
                lwd = 3, cex = 2.2)
            dev.off()

        }
    }
}
```

```{r}
# Row-only filter (keeps all columns)
apply_filter <- function(d, f) {
  if (length(f) == 0) return(d)
  keep <- rep(TRUE, nrow(d))
  for (nm in names(f)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(d)) next
    v <- f[[nm]]
    if (anyNA(v)) {
      vals <- v[!is.na(v)]
      keep <- keep & ((d[[nm]] %in% vals) | (is.na(d[[nm]]) & any(is.na(v))))
    } else {
      keep <- keep & (d[[nm]] %in% v)
    }
  }
  d[keep, , drop = FALSE]
}

# Mean of fitness_mean for each filter, optionally within a tick range or set
mean_fitness_by_filters <- function(
  df, filters, col = "fitness_mean",
  tick_col = "tick",
  tick_range = NULL,      # e.g., c(10000, 10300)  (inclusive)
  tick_values = NULL,     # e.g., c(10050, 10060, 10300)
  na.rm = TRUE
) {
  stopifnot(is.data.frame(df), length(filters) >= 1, col %in% names(df))
  if (!tick_col %in% names(df)) stop("Column '", tick_col, "' not found.")

  d0 <- df
  # coerce types
  d0[[tick_col]] <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(d0[[tick_col]]))

  # apply tick restriction first (keeps all columns)
  if (!is.null(tick_range)) {
    if (length(tick_range) != 2) stop("tick_range must be length-2 (min, max).")
    tmin <- min(tick_range); tmax <- max(tick_range)
    d0 <- d0[is.finite(d0[[tick_col]]) & d0[[tick_col]] >= tmin & d0[[tick_col]] <= tmax, , drop = FALSE]
  }
  if (!is.null(tick_values)) {
    d0 <- d0[d0[[tick_col]] %in% tick_values, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  out <- lapply(seq_along(filters), function(i) {
    fi <- filters[[i]]
    di <- apply_filter(d0, fi)
    mu <- if (nrow(di)) mean(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(di[[col]])), na.rm = na.rm) else NA_real_
    mu <- mu/0.0001
    lbl <- paste0(names(filters)[i] %||% paste0("F", i), ": ",
                  paste(paste(names(fi), fi, sep = "="), collapse = ","))
    data.frame(filter = lbl, n_rows = nrow(di), mean_fitness = mu, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  })
  do.call(rbind, out)
}
`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (!is.null(a) && nzchar(a)) a else b

for (gap in c(1, 10, 100)){
    for (n in c(8,20,50)){
        for (sz in c(20, 40, 60)){
        for (reg in c("ave")){
            filt_A <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.0, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz)
            filt_B <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.5, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz)
            filt_C <- list(reg = reg, n = n, psi = 0.9, fluctuate_gap = gap, shift_size = sz)
            res <- mean_fitness_by_filters(
            df = data_df,
            filters = list(A = filt_A, B = filt_B, C = filt_C),
            col = "fitness_mean",
            tick_range = c(10000, 10000+3*gap)   # inclusive range
            )
            print(res)
        }}}}
```
